bullets: Maintained and enhanced a production event management platform serving 2,000+ users by refactoring React.js and Node.js components under Agile workflows, improving uptime and responsiveness
Built a Flask analytics dashboard integrating a GraphQL API to process 1,000+ real-time engagement score records with pandas, giving 20+ schools instant visibility into event performance
Eliminated API bottlenecks during peak traffic by implementing APScheduler-based caching that refreshes score data every minute, sustaining sub-second page response times during live events
Led end-to-end technical execution of 10+ workshops driving 150+ participant engagements, overseeing speaker coordination, tooling stack selection, and deployment of collaboration platforms
Built a data-driven engagement metrics system to track attendance trends and session effectiveness, translating insights into iterative strategy that compounded member participation growth by 25%
Architected and scaled the club's technical infrastructure by establishing a systems-level partnership framework across 10+ student organizations, standardizing integration protocols
